title: VillagerSpawnedPayload
description: A bot session joined the world as this villager. Producer: minecraft-service on world.events. Distinct from VillagerCreated (identity provisioned in agent_db).

spawnReason.description: Why the bot session started: initial seeding, death respawn, or connection recovery.

Position.description: Entity coordinates are doubles in Minecraft (catalog shorthand 'pos' says int; number is the truthful type).
